items.title: The SpaceX IPO made history. One month on has it lost momentum?
items.dek: A month on from the firm's stock market debut, the reality of how SpaceX currently makes money has seemed to come into clearer focus.
items.body: A month on from the firm's stock market debut, the reality of how SpaceX currently makes money has seemed to come into clearer focus.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: At the scene where Bangkok's deadly bar fire unfolded
items.dek: The BBC’s South East Asia correspondent visits the site where at least 27 people were killed during a bar fire in Thailand.
items.body: The BBC’s South East Asia correspondent visits the site where at least 27 people were killed during a bar fire in Thailand.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.
items.body: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.
